rationale: The proposed change to the homestead exemption under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relationship to Educ. Code §11.1542, which governs charter school offers to purchase or lease unused district facilities.
quote: Sec. 11.1542. OPEN-ENROLLMENT CHARTER SCHOOL OFFER FOR DISTRICT FACILITY.
_note: No overlap between proposed homestead exemption increase and this education code provision regarding district facility sales/leases to charter schools.
